svg.title: A196 controlled ChaCha10 split8 versus split9 cut boundary
svg.desc: The same still-secret round-10 width-20 challenge has status-equivalent complete 32-cell split8 and split9 boundaries: all cells are UNKNOWN and no model is returned.
svg.text: A196 — controlled split8 versus split9 cut transfer
Byte-identical fresh ChaCha10 challenge · unchanged 2²⁰ domain · equal 10 s per-cell budgets
Each cut: 32 × 2¹⁵ = 2²⁰, a complete disjoint structural cover of the same 1,048,576 candidates.
Split8 and split9 are status-equivalent complete boundaries under this fixed budget; neither returns a model.
UNKNOWN is not UNSAT: the controlled comparison makes no absence, recovery, or uniqueness claim.
All 64 predeclared cell executions complete in numeric order without early stop.
